expectations.text: build() returns render array with #cache key containing BOTH 'tags' AND 'contexts' (the golden rule: EVERY render array needs #cache)
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php lines 128-131: the build() method returns a render array with '#cache' => ['contexts' => $this->getCacheContexts(), 'tags' => $cache_tags]. Both 'tags' and 'contexts' are present. The empty-results path (lines 99-102) also includes both.

expectations.text: Cache tags include node-specific tags (node:ID pattern) for data dependency invalidation
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php line 121: `$cache_tags = Cache::mergeTags($cache_tags, $node->getCacheTags());` -- Node::getCacheTags() returns ['node:ID'] for each loaded node. Additionally line 196 adds 'node_list' as a base tag. When nodes are loaded (line 108), their individual cache tags (node:1, node:2, etc.) are merged into the render array.

expectations.text: Cache contexts include 'route' or 'url.path' or 'url' for page variation AND 'user' or 'user.permissions' or 'user.roles' for per-user variation
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php lines 179-185: getCacheContexts() merges 'url' (page variation) and 'user' (per-user variation) into parent contexts. Both required context types are present.

expectations.text: Does NOT set max-age to 0 anywhere (max-age: 0 kills the ENTIRE page cache via bubbling -- use lazy_builder instead)
expectations.evidence: Grep for 'max-age.*0|max_age.*0|#max-age|#maxage|max.age' across the entire module directory returned no matches. No max-age is set anywhere in the module.

expectations.text: Does NOT use \Drupal::cache() for render caching (render arrays use #cache, not manual cache API)
expectations.evidence: Grep for '\\Drupal::cache()' across the entire module directory returned no matches. The module correctly uses #cache on render arrays instead of manual cache API calls.

expectations.text: If the block varies per user, uses cache context 'user' (NOT max-age: 0 as a workaround for per-user variation)
expectations.evidence: The block varies per user (RelatedContentBlock.php lines 166-168 filter by currentUser->id()). It correctly uses cache context 'user' (line 184) rather than max-age: 0. No max-age: 0 is set anywhere.

expectations.text: #cache metadata is on the OUTERMOST render array element (not buried inside a child element where it won't bubble correctly)
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php lines 124-132: The returned render array has #cache at the top level alongside #theme, #items, and #title. It is not nested inside a child element. Same for the empty case (lines 98-103).

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en related_content_block returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Running 'ddev drush en related_content_block -y' returned '[notice] Already installed: related_content_block' with EXIT_CODE=0.

expectations.text: E2E: Block renders without errors after placement
expectations.evidence:
After placing the block programmatically and creating a test node, curl -sk https://d10-caching-without.ddev.site/ shows the block rendered: '
